pages.title: BMI Calculator for Women - Check Your Body Mass Index
pages.description: Free BMI calculator designed for women. Calculate your Body Mass Index and find healthy weight ranges specific to female body composition.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator for women, female bmi, women body mass index
pages.intro: Calculate your BMI with ranges optimized for women's body composition.

faq.q: What is a healthy BMI for women?
faq.a: A healthy BMI for women is between 18.5 and 24.9. Women naturally have more body fat than men.

faq.q: Does BMI differ for women and men?
faq.a: The formula is the same, but interpretation may vary due to body composition differences.

pages.title: BMI Calculator for Men - Male Body Mass Index
pages.description: Free BMI calculator for men. Calculate your Body Mass Index and check healthy weight ranges for adult males.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator for men, male bmi, men body mass index
pages.intro: Calculate your BMI with interpretation specific to men's body composition.

faq.q: What is a good BMI for men?
faq.a: A healthy BMI for men is between 18.5 and 24.9. Muscular men may have elevated BMI without excess fat.

faq.q: Is BMI accurate for muscular men?
faq.a: BMI may overestimate body fat in muscular men. Consider waist circumference as additional measure.

pages.title: BMI Calculator for Kids & Children - Pediatric BMI
pages.description: Free BMI calculator for children and teens. Calculate pediatric BMI percentile based on age and gender.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator for kids, children bmi, pediatric bmi
pages.intro: Calculate BMI for children aged 2-19 with age-gender specific percentiles.

faq.q: How is BMI calculated for children?
faq.a: Children's BMI uses the same formula but results are plotted on age-gender specific growth charts.

faq.q: What BMI percentile is healthy for kids?
faq.a: Between the 5th and 85th percentile is considered healthy weight.

pages.title: BMI Calculator with Age - Age-Adjusted BMI
pages.description: Calculate your BMI with age adjustment. See how your Body Mass Index compares to healthy ranges for your age group.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator with age, age adjusted bmi, bmi by age
pages.intro: Calculate your age-adjusted BMI. Healthy weight ranges vary by age group.

faq.q: Does BMI change with age?
faq.a: BMI interpretation varies with age. Older adults may benefit from slightly higher BMI (23-27).

faq.q: What is a healthy BMI for seniors?
faq.a: Research suggests BMI of 23-27 may be optimal for adults over 65.

pages.title: BMI Calculator for Athletes - Sports Body Composition
pages.description: BMI calculator for athletes and active individuals. Understand BMI limitations for muscular body types.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator athletes, sports bmi, athlete body mass index
pages.intro: Calculate your BMI with context for athletic body types.

faq.q: Why is BMI inaccurate for athletes?
faq.a: BMI doesn't distinguish between muscle and fat. Athletes often have high BMI due to muscle.

faq.q: What should athletes use instead?
faq.a: Consider body fat percentage, waist-to-hip ratio, or DEXA scans.

pages.title: BMI Calculator Metric (kg/cm) - Metric Units
pages.description: Calculate your BMI using metric units (kilograms and centimeters). Free online metric BMI calculator.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator metric, bmi kg cm, metric body mass index
pages.intro: Calculate your Body Mass Index using kilograms and centimeters.

faq.q: What is the BMI formula in metric?
faq.a: BMI = weight(kg) ÷ height(m)². Example: 70kg, 1.75m → 70÷3.0625 = 22.9

faq.q: How to convert imperial to metric?
faq.a: Multiply pounds by 0.453 for kg. Multiply inches by 2.54 for cm.

pages.title: BMI Calculator for Pregnancy - Pre-Pregnancy BMI
pages.description: Calculate pre-pregnancy BMI to determine healthy weight gain during pregnancy. Essential for prenatal planning.
pages.keywords: bmi calculator pregnancy, pre pregnancy bmi, pregnant weight gain
pages.intro: Calculate your pre-pregnancy BMI to determine recommended weight gain.

faq.q: Why is pre-pregnancy BMI important?
faq.a: It determines recommended weight gain: normal BMI = 25-35 lbs gain recommended.

faq.q: Should I calculate BMI during pregnancy?
faq.a: Use pre-pregnancy weight. During pregnancy, focus on recommended weight gain ranges.

pages.title: Mortgage Calculator - Monthly Payment Calculator
pages.description: Free mortgage calculator. Calculate your monthly mortgage payment including principal, interest, taxes and insurance.
pages.keywords: mortgage calculator, monthly mortgage payment, home loan calculator
pages.intro: Calculate your monthly mortgage payment based on loan amount, interest rate, and term.

faq.q: How is monthly mortgage payment calculated?
faq.a: Monthly payment = P[r(1+r)^n]/[(1+r)^n-1], where P=principal, r=monthly rate, n=number of payments.

faq.q: What is included in a mortgage payment?
faq.a: Typically includes principal, interest, property taxes, and homeowner's insurance (PITI).

pages.title: 30-Year Mortgage Calculator - Fixed Rate Home Loan
pages.description: Calculate monthly payments for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage. Compare rates and see total interest paid.
pages.keywords: 30 year mortgage calculator, 30 year fixed rate, home loan 30 years
pages.intro: Calculate payments for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage, the most popular home loan term.

faq.q: What is the current 30-year mortgage rate?
faq.a: Rates vary by lender and credit score. Check current rates with multiple lenders for best comparison.

faq.q: Is a 30-year mortgage better than 15-year?
faq.a: 30-year has lower monthly payments but more total interest. 15-year saves interest but has higher payments.

pages.title: 15-Year Mortgage Calculator - Short Term Home Loan
pages.description: Calculate monthly payments for a 15-year mortgage. See how much interest you save vs a 30-year loan.
pages.keywords: 15 year mortgage calculator, 15 year fixed rate, short term mortgage
pages.intro: Calculate payments for a 15-year mortgage and see total interest savings.

faq.q: How much do you save with a 15-year mortgage?
faq.a: You typically save 50-60% in total interest compared to a 30-year mortgage.

faq.q: What are 15-year mortgage rates?
faq.a: 15-year rates are typically 0.5-0.75% lower than 30-year rates.

pages.title: Auto Loan Calculator - Car Payment Calculator
pages.description: Free auto loan calculator. Calculate monthly car payments based on price, down payment, interest rate and loan term.
pages.keywords: auto loan calculator, car payment calculator, car loan monthly payment
pages.intro: Calculate your monthly car payment and total cost of your auto loan.

faq.q: What is a good interest rate for a car loan?
faq.a: Good rates range from 3-6% for new cars with good credit. Used cars typically have higher rates.

faq.q: How long should a car loan be?
faq.a: 3-5 years is recommended. Longer terms mean more interest paid overall.

pages.title: Student Loan Calculator - Education Loan Payment
pages.description: Calculate student loan monthly payments and total repayment cost. Compare repayment plans and see payoff timeline.
pages.keywords: student loan calculator, education loan payment, student debt calculator
pages.intro: Calculate your student loan payments and explore repayment options.

faq.q: What are student loan repayment options?
faq.a: Standard (10yr), Graduated, Extended, and Income-Driven plans are available for federal loans.

faq.q: How much student loan can I afford?
faq.a: A common rule: total student debt should not exceed your expected first-year salary.

pages.title: Personal Loan Calculator - Unsecured Loan Payment
pages.description: Calculate monthly payments for personal loans. Compare rates and terms for unsecured personal loans.
pages.keywords: personal loan calculator, unsecured loan payment, personal loan monthly payment
pages.intro: Calculate monthly payments and total cost for personal loans.

faq.q: What is a personal loan?
faq.a: An unsecured loan not backed by collateral, typically used for debt consolidation, home improvement, or major purchases.

faq.q: What credit score do I need?
faq.a: Most lenders require 600+ for approval. Best rates typically require 720+.

pages.title: Loan Amortization Calculator - Payment Schedule
pages.description: Generate a complete loan amortization schedule. See how each payment splits between principal and interest.
pages.keywords: loan amortization calculator, amortization schedule, payment breakdown
pages.intro: Generate a detailed amortization schedule showing principal and interest breakdown for each payment.

faq.q: What is loan amortization?
faq.a: Amortization is the process of paying off debt through regular payments that cover both principal and interest.

faq.q: Why do early payments go mostly to interest?
faq.a: Interest is calculated on remaining balance. Early on, the balance is highest so interest portion is largest.

pages.title: Percentage Increase Calculator - Calculate % Increase
pages.description: Calculate percentage increase between two numbers. Free online tool to find percent growth or rise.
pages.keywords: percentage increase calculator, percent increase, calculate percentage growth
pages.intro: Calculate the percentage increase from one value to another instantly.

faq.q: How to calculate percentage increase?
faq.a: Percentage increase = ((New - Old) / Old) × 100. Example: 50 to 75 = ((75-50)/50)×100 = 50%

faq.q: What is the difference between increase and growth?
faq.a: They are the same calculation. Both measure the relative change from an original value.

pages.title: Percentage Decrease Calculator - Calculate % Decrease
pages.description: Calculate percentage decrease between two numbers. Find percent reduction, decline or drop instantly.
pages.keywords: percentage decrease calculator, percent decrease, calculate percentage drop
pages.intro: Calculate the percentage decrease from one value to another.

faq.q: How to calculate percentage decrease?
faq.a: Percentage decrease = ((Old - New) / Old) × 100. Example: 80 to 60 = ((80-60)/80)×100 = 25%

faq.q: Can percentage decrease be over 100%?
faq.a: No. A 100% decrease means the value went to zero. Decreases are capped at 100%.

pages.title: Percentage Change Calculator - Find % Difference
pages.description: Calculate percentage change between any two values. Determine if it's an increase or decrease automatically.
pages.keywords: percentage change calculator, percent change, percentage difference calculator
pages.intro: Calculate the percentage change between two values. Works for both increases and decreases.

faq.q: What is percentage change?
faq.a: Percentage change measures the relative difference between an old and new value, expressed as a percent.

faq.q: How is percentage change different from percentage difference?
faq.a: Change has direction (increase/decrease) relative to original. Difference is the absolute gap between two values.

pages.title: Percentage Off Calculator - Discount Calculator
pages.description: Calculate sale price after percentage off. Find how much you save with any percent discount.
pages.keywords: percentage off calculator, discount calculator, percent off sale price
pages.intro: Calculate the final price after applying a percentage discount.

faq.q: How to calculate 20% off?
faq.a: Multiply the price by 0.80 (or subtract 20% of the price). Example: $50 × 0.80 = $40

faq.q: How to calculate percentage off?
faq.a: Discount amount = Original price × (Percentage off / 100). Final price = Original - Discount.

pages.title: What is X% of Y? - Percentage of Number Calculator
pages.description: Calculate what percentage of a number is. Find X% of any number instantly with this free calculator.
pages.keywords: what is percentage of number, calculate percent of number, x percent of y
pages.h1: What is X% of Y? Calculator
pages.intro: Quickly calculate what any percentage of any number equals.

faq.q: How to find a percentage of a number?
faq.a: Multiply the number by the percentage divided by 100. Example: 15% of 200 = 200 × 0.15 = 30

faq.q: What is 20% of 100?
faq.a: 20% of 100 = 20. Simply multiply 100 × 0.20 = 20.

pages.title: Fraction to Percentage Calculator - Convert Fractions
pages.description: Convert any fraction to a percentage. Free calculator to turn fractions into percent values instantly.
pages.keywords: fraction to percentage, convert fraction to percent, fraction percentage calculator
pages.intro: Convert any fraction to its percentage equivalent instantly.

faq.q: How to convert fraction to percentage?
faq.a: Divide the numerator by denominator, then multiply by 100. Example: 3/4 = 0.75 × 100 = 75%

faq.q: What is 1/3 as a percentage?
faq.a: 1/3 = 33.33% (repeating decimal).

pages.title: Restaurant Tip Calculator - How Much to Tip
pages.description: Calculate the right tip amount at restaurants. Standard tipping guide with 15%, 18%, and 20% options.
pages.keywords: restaurant tip calculator, how much to tip, dining tip calculator
pages.intro: Calculate the appropriate tip for your restaurant meal with standard percentage options.

faq.q: How much should you tip at a restaurant?
faq.a: Standard tipping: 15% for adequate service, 18% for good service, 20%+ for excellent service.

faq.q: Do you tip on tax?
faq.a: Traditionally, tip is calculated on the pre-tax subtotal, though tipping on the total is also common.

pages.title: Split Bill Tip Calculator - Divide Check Evenly
pages.description: Calculate tip and split the bill evenly among friends. Easy bill splitting with customizable tip percentage.
pages.keywords: split bill calculator, split tip calculator, divide check evenly
pages.intro: Calculate the tip and split the total bill evenly among your group.

faq.q: How to split a bill with tip?
faq.a: Add tip to subtotal, then divide by number of people. Example: $100 meal + 20% tip = $120 ÷ 4 people = $30 each.

faq.q: Should you split tip evenly?
faq.a: Splitting evenly is simplest. For unequal orders, calculate each person's share proportionally.

pages.title: Delivery Tip Calculator - Food Delivery Tipping Guide
pages.description: Calculate how much to tip delivery drivers. Tipping guide for food delivery, pizza, and grocery delivery.
pages.keywords: delivery tip calculator, food delivery tip, how much to tip delivery
pages.intro: Calculate the appropriate tip for food and grocery delivery drivers.

faq.q: How much to tip delivery drivers?
faq.a: Standard: $3-5 for small orders, 15-20% for larger orders, more for bad weather or long distances.

faq.q: Do you tip on delivery apps?
faq.a: Yes, delivery app drivers rely on tips. Tip 15-20% or at least $3-5 per delivery.

pages.title: Hair Salon Tip Calculator - Hairdresser Tipping Guide
pages.description: Calculate how much to tip at hair salons. Tipping guide for haircuts, coloring, and styling services.
pages.keywords: hair salon tip calculator, hairdresser tip, how much to tip stylist
pages.intro: Calculate the right tip for your hairdresser or stylist.

faq.q: How much to tip hairdresser?
faq.a: Standard is 15-20% of the total service cost. For exceptional service, 25% or more.

faq.q: Do you tip salon owner?
faq.a: Traditionally owners weren't tipped, but modern etiquette says tipping the owner is appreciated.

pages.title: 15% 18% 20% Tip Calculator - Quick Tip Guide
pages.description: Instantly calculate 15%, 18%, or 20% tip on any bill amount. The quickest way to figure out your tip.
pages.keywords: 15 percent tip, 18 percent tip, 20 percent tip calculator
pages.intro: Quickly calculate common tip percentages on any bill amount.

faq.q: When to tip 15% vs 20%?
faq.a: 15% for adequate service, 18% for good service, 20% for great service. Adjust based on experience.

faq.q: How to calculate 20% tip quickly?
faq.a: Move the decimal one place left (10%), then double it. Example: $45 → $4.50 → $9.00 tip.

pages.title: Age Calculator by Birthday - How Old Am I?
pages.description: Calculate your exact age from your birthday. Find out how old you are in years, months, and days.
pages.keywords: age calculator birthday, how old am i, calculate age from birthday
pages.h1: Age Calculator - How Old Am I?
pages.intro: Enter your birthday to calculate your exact age in years, months, and days.

faq.q: How to calculate age from birthday?
faq.a: Subtract your birth date from today's date to get your exact age in years, months, and days.

faq.q: Does the calculator account for leap years?
faq.a: Yes, our calculator correctly handles leap years in age calculations.

pages.title: Age in Days Calculator - How Many Days Old Am I?
pages.description: Find out exactly how many days old you are. Calculate your age in days from your date of birth.
pages.keywords: age in days calculator, how many days old, days since birth
pages.intro: Calculate exactly how many days you have been alive since birth.

faq.q: How many days old is a 30 year old?
faq.a: Approximately 10,957 days (30 × 365.25 accounting for leap years).

faq.q: How to calculate days between dates?
faq.a: Count all days between two dates including leap year adjustments.

pages.title: Age in Months Calculator - How Many Months Old
pages.description: Calculate your age in months. Find the exact number of months between your birthday and today.
pages.keywords: age in months calculator, how many months old, months since birth
pages.intro: Calculate your exact age in months from your date of birth.

faq.q: How many months in a year?
faq.a: 12 months. Your age in months = years × 12 + remaining months.

faq.q: Why calculate age in months?
faq.a: Useful for baby milestones, medical records, and precise age tracking.

pages.title: Retirement Age Calculator - When Can I Retire?
pages.description: Calculate your retirement age and countdown. Find out how many years until you reach retirement age.
pages.keywords: retirement age calculator, when can i retire, years until retirement
pages.intro: Calculate how many years until you reach retirement age based on your birth date.

faq.q: What is the retirement age?
faq.a: In the US, full Social Security retirement age is 66-67 depending on birth year. Many countries have similar ranges.

faq.q: Can I retire early?
faq.a: Early retirement is possible at 62 in the US with reduced benefits. Financial planning determines feasibility.

pages.title: Age Difference Calculator - Compare Two Ages
pages.description: Calculate the age difference between two people. Find the exact gap in years, months, and days.
pages.keywords: age difference calculator, age gap calculator, compare two ages
pages.intro: Calculate the exact age difference between two people.

faq.q: How to calculate age difference?
faq.a: Subtract the younger person's birth date from the older person's birth date.

faq.q: What is a normal age difference in couples?
faq.a: Average age difference in couples is 2-3 years, but varies widely by culture and preference.

faq.q: What is the formula for C to F?
What is 0°C in Fahrenheit?

pages.description: Convert Fahrenheit to Celsius instantly. Free temperature converter with formula and reference chart.
pages.keywords: fahrenheit to celsius, f to c converter, temperature converter fahrenheit

faq.q: What is the formula for F to C?
What is 72°F in Celsius?

pages.title: Body Temperature Converter - Fever Check Calculator
pages.description: Convert body temperature between Celsius and Fahrenheit. Check if you have a fever with normal range reference.
pages.keywords: body temperature converter, fever calculator, normal body temperature
pages.intro: Convert body temperature and check if readings indicate a fever.

faq.q: What is normal body temperature?
faq.a: Normal is 98.6°F (37°C), but ranges from 97-99°F (36.1-37.2°C) throughout the day.

faq.q: What temperature is a fever?
faq.a: Generally, 100.4°F (38°C) or higher is considered a fever.

faq.q: How many pounds in a kilogram?
faq.a: 1 kilogram = 2.20462 pounds.

faq.q: How to convert kg to lbs?
faq.a: Multiply kilograms by 2.20462. Example: 70 kg × 2.20462 = 154.3 lbs

faq.q: How to convert inches to cm?
faq.a: Multiply inches by 2.54. Example: 12 inches × 2.54 = 30.48 cm

pages.title: Sale Price Calculator - Calculate Discounted Price
pages.description: Calculate the final sale price after discount. Find out how much you save and pay with any percentage off.
pages.keywords: sale price calculator, discounted price, calculate sale price
pages.intro: Calculate the final price after applying any discount percentage.

faq.q: How to calculate sale price?
faq.a: Sale price = Original price × (1 - discount/100). Example: $80 with 25% off = $80 × 0.75 = $60

faq.q: How to find original price from sale price?
faq.a: Original = Sale price ÷ (1 - discount/100). Example: $60 at 25% off → $60 ÷ 0.75 = $80

pages.title: Double Discount Calculator - Stacking Discounts
pages.description: Calculate the final price with two stacked discounts. Find the combined discount percentage.
pages.keywords: double discount calculator, stacking discounts, two discounts calculator
pages.intro: Calculate the final price when two discounts are applied one after another.

faq.q: How do stacked discounts work?
faq.a: Apply first discount, then apply second discount to the reduced price. 20% + 10% ≠ 30%.

faq.q: What is 20% off then 10% off?
faq.a: $100 → 20% off = $80 → 10% off = $72. Combined discount is 28%, not 30%.

pages.title: Markup Calculator - Calculate Selling Price
pages.description: Calculate selling price from cost and markup percentage. Find profit margin and markup for any product.
pages.keywords: markup calculator, calculate selling price, markup percentage
pages.intro: Calculate the selling price based on cost and desired markup percentage.

faq.q: What is markup?
faq.a: Markup is the percentage added to cost to determine selling price. Markup = (Price - Cost) / Cost × 100

faq.q: What is the difference between markup and margin?
faq.a: Markup is based on cost, margin is based on selling price. 50% markup = 33.3% margin.

pages.title: College GPA Calculator - Calculate Your Grade Point Average
pages.description: Calculate your college GPA. Enter your courses and grades to find your cumulative grade point average.
pages.keywords: college gpa calculator, university gpa, cumulative gpa calculator
pages.intro: Calculate your cumulative college GPA from your course grades.

faq.q: How is college GPA calculated?
faq.a: GPA = Total grade points ÷ Total credit hours. A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0.

faq.q: What is a good college GPA?
faq.a: 3.0+ is generally good. 3.5+ is very good. 3.7+ is excellent for graduate school applications.

pages.title: High School GPA Calculator - Calculate Your GPA
pages.description: Calculate your high school GPA for college applications. Supports weighted and unweighted GPA scales.
pages.keywords: high school gpa calculator, weighted gpa, unweighted gpa calculator
pages.intro: Calculate your high school GPA on both weighted and unweighted scales.

faq.q: What is weighted vs unweighted GPA?
faq.a: Unweighted is on 4.0 scale. Weighted gives extra points for AP/Honors (up to 5.0 scale).

faq.q: What GPA do colleges look for?
faq.a: Top colleges typically want 3.7+ unweighted. State schools often accept 3.0+.

pages.title: Days Between Dates Calculator - Count Days
pages.description: Calculate the number of days between two dates. Find exact days, weeks, and months between any two dates.
pages.keywords: days between dates, count days between dates, date difference calculator
pages.intro: Calculate the exact number of days between any two dates.

faq.q: How to count days between dates?
faq.a: Enter start and end dates. The calculator counts all days between them, accounting for leap years.

faq.q: Does it include the end date?
faq.a: By default, it counts days between (exclusive of end date). Add 1 if you want to include both dates.

pages.title: Weeks Between Dates Calculator - Count Weeks
pages.description: Calculate the number of weeks between two dates. Find exact weeks and remaining days between any dates.
pages.keywords: weeks between dates, count weeks, weeks calculator between dates
pages.intro: Calculate the exact number of weeks between any two dates.

faq.q: How to calculate weeks between dates?
faq.a: Divide the number of days between dates by 7 to get weeks.

faq.q: How many weeks in a year?
faq.a: 52 weeks and 1 day (or 2 days in a leap year).

pages.title: Gas Cost Calculator for Road Trips - Trip Fuel Cost
pages.description: Calculate gas cost for your road trip. Enter distance, fuel efficiency, and gas price to estimate trip fuel expenses.
pages.keywords: gas cost calculator road trip, trip fuel cost, road trip gas calculator
pages.intro: Estimate your fuel cost for any road trip based on distance and your vehicle's fuel efficiency.

faq.q: How to calculate gas cost for a trip?
faq.a: Gas cost = (Distance ÷ MPG) × Gas price. Example: 300 miles ÷ 25 MPG × $3.50 = $42

faq.q: How to improve fuel efficiency?
faq.a: Maintain steady speed, proper tire pressure, reduce weight, and avoid aggressive driving.

faq.q: 女性健康BMI是多少？
faq.a: 女性健康BMI范围为18.5-24.9。女性天然体脂率高于男性。

faq.q: BMI对女性准确吗？
faq.a: BMI是筛查工具，不直接测量体脂。建议结合腰围等指标综合评估。

pages.title: 房贷计算器等额本息 - 月供计算器
pages.description: 等额本息房贷计算器，计算每月还款额、总利息和还款明细。支持商业贷款和公积金贷款。

pages.h1: 房贷计算器 - 等额本息
pages.intro: 计算等额本息还款方式下的每月月供、总利息和还款计划。

faq.q: 什么是等额本息？
faq.a: 每月还款金额固定，前期利息占比大，后期本金占比大。适合收入稳定的借款人。

faq.q: 等额本息和等额本金哪个划算？
faq.a: 等额本金总利息更少，但前期月供更高。等额本息月供固定，还款压力均匀。

pages.title: 房贷计算器等额本金 - 递减还款计算

pages.keywords: 房贷计算器等额本金, 递减还款, 等额本金月供
pages.h1: 房贷计算器 - 等额本金
pages.intro: 计算等额本金还款方式下的递减月供和总利息。

faq.q: 什么是等额本金？
faq.a: 每月偿还相同本金，利息逐月递减，月供逐月减少。总利息比等额本息少。

faq.q: 等额本金适合什么人？
faq.a: 适合前期还款能力强、希望减少总利息支出的借款人。

pages.title: 百分比涨幅计算器 - 计算增长率
pages.description: 在线计算百分比涨幅和增长率。输入原始值和新值，自动计算增长百分比。
pages.keywords: 百分比涨幅计算器, 增长率计算, 涨幅百分比
pages.intro: 快速计算两个数值之间的百分比涨幅。

faq.q: 涨幅怎么算？
涨幅和增长率一样吗？
faq.a: 是的，涨幅和增长率是同一个计算方法。

pages.title: 虚岁计算器 - 周岁虚岁换算
pages.description: 在线虚岁计算器，输入出生日期自动计算周岁和虚岁。了解虚岁的计算方法。
pages.keywords: 虚岁计算器, 周岁虚岁换算, 虚岁怎么算
pages.intro: 输入出生日期，自动计算您的周岁和虚岁。

faq.q: 虚岁怎么算？
faq.a: 虚岁 = 周岁 + 1（过了生日）或 周岁 + 2（未过生日）。出生即为1岁，每过一个春节加1岁。

faq.q: 为什么有虚岁？
faq.a: 虚岁是中国传统计龄方式，将在母体中的时间也计入年龄。

pages.title: AA制计算器 - 聚餐分摊费用
pages.description: AA制聚餐费用分摊计算器。输入总金额和人数，自动计算每人应付金额。
pages.keywords: AA制计算器, 聚餐分摊, 费用平摊计算器
pages.intro: 快速计算聚餐或活动费用的人均分摊金额。

faq.q: AA制怎么算？
faq.a: 总费用 ÷ 人数 = 每人应付。例：餐费500元，5人AA，每人100元。

faq.q: 有人没喝酒怎么分？
faq.a: 可以先扣除酒水费用由喝酒的人分摊，剩余餐费再平均分。

pages.title: 摄氏度华氏度转换器 - 温度换算
pages.description: 在线摄氏度华氏度互转工具。支持摄氏度转华氏度、华氏度转摄氏度，附转换公式。
pages.keywords: 摄氏度华氏度转换, 温度换算, 摄氏转华氏
pages.intro: 快速进行摄氏度和华氏度之间的温度转换。

faq.q: 摄氏度转华氏度公式？
华氏度转摄氏度公式？

pages.title: 双重折扣计算器 - 折上折计算
pages.description: 计算双重折扣（折上折）后的最终价格。了解两次打折的实际优惠力度。
pages.keywords: 双重折扣计算器, 折上折计算, 叠加折扣
pages.intro: 计算两次折扣叠加后的最终价格和实际折扣率。

faq.q: 折上折怎么算？
faq.a: 先算第一次折扣价，再对折后价格打第二次折。8折再7折 = 0.8×0.7 = 0.56，即5.6折。

faq.q: 两个折扣能直接相加吗？
faq.a: 不能。8折+7折≠5折。正确算法是两个折扣相乘：0.8×0.7=0.56折。

pages.title: 高速油费计算器 - 自驾出行油费
pages.description: 计算自驾出行的油费开支。输入里程、油耗和油价，估算高速公路行程油费。
pages.keywords: 高速油费计算器, 自驾油费, 公路旅行油费计算
pages.intro: 估算自驾出行的燃油费用，帮助规划旅行预算。

faq.q: 油费怎么算？
faq.a: 油费 = 里程(km) ÷ 100 × 百公里油耗(L) × 油价(元/L)。例：500km，8L/100km，7.5元/L = 300元

faq.q: 怎么降低油耗？
faq.a: 保持匀速行驶、正确胎压、减少负重、避免急加速急刹车。

pages.title: 抽奖随机数生成器 - 在线抽奖工具
pages.description: 在线随机数抽奖工具。设置范围自动生成随机数，适用于抽奖、摇号、随机分组。
pages.keywords: 抽奖随机数生成器, 在线抽奖, 随机数生成
pages.intro: 生成指定范围内的随机数，适用于抽奖和随机选择。

faq.q: 随机数是真随机吗？
faq.a: 计算机生成的是伪随机数，但对于抽奖等日常用途完全足够公平。

faq.q: 可以生成不重复的随机数吗？
faq.a: 可以设置不重复模式，适合抽奖时确保每个号码只出现一次。
